subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, et al, spoken on 1919-12-31
subcodes.first_line: In the world of existence it is possible that the truth should not become known? No, e.g., if we were not faithful towards the government they certainly would find out.
subcodes.subjects: @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @free will and predestination; fate, @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
